gist.headline: Building the builders
gist.blurb: Website Studio just landed in our community greenhouse. It's a neat new resource helping local businesses find the perfect website builder for their needs.
gist.summary: Added Website Studio to the community apps showcase, providing a resource for local businesses to evaluate website building platforms.
gist.impact: The community directory now features Website Studio, expanding our showcase of business-focused tools built with Pollinations.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'Website Studio', a tool for finding website builders for local businesses. Visuals: A cozy pixel art studio or workshop. The bee mascot (Polly) wearing a little toolbelt or hardhat, looking at a blueprint or a tiny pixelated storefront/website mockup alongside the monitor-head robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hardhat, looking at a glowing blueprint of a storefront with the chunky monitor-head robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'STUDIO'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
